value.stringValue: Lab Order has failed to be sent to {!Autolaunch_Lab_Order_Submit_Lab_Order.rec_LabOrder.Lab_Provider__c}

actionCalls.description: This logs for the end users to see the error on the lab order.
actionCalls.name: Log_Error_in_API_Call_Info_Log
actionCalls.label: Log - Error in API Call - Info Log

value.stringValue: Lab Order has failed to be sent to {!Autolaunch_Lab_Order_Submit_Lab_Order.rec_LabOrder.Lab_Provider__c}

actionCalls.name: Log_Fault_in_Updating_Lab_Order
actionCalls.label: Log - Fault in Updating Lab Order

actionCalls.description: This logs for the end users to see the error on the lab order.
actionCalls.name: Log_Success_in_API_Call
actionCalls.label: Log - Success in API Call

value.stringValue: Lab Order has successfully been sent to {!Autolaunch_Lab_Order_Submit_Lab_Order.rec_LabOrder.Lab_Provider__c}

actionCalls.description: This logs for the end users to see the error on the lab order.
actionCalls.name: Log_Success_in_Opportunity_Update
actionCalls.label: Log - Success in Opportunity Update

actionCalls.description: This logs for the end users to see the error on the lab order.
actionCalls.name: Log_Success_in_Update_Lab_Order
actionCalls.label: Log - Success in Update Lab Order

value.stringValue: Lab Order has successfully been updated

actionCalls.name: Log_User_selected_bypass_address_validation
actionCalls.label: Log - User selected bypass address validation

value.stringValue: User selected Google Validation Suggested Address

assignments.description: This will update the lab order with the latest error message from the address validation
assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_on_Lab_Order
assignments.label: Set Error Message on Lab Order

assignments.name: Set_Returned_Record_From_Clear_Message_Element_To_New_Record
assignments.label: Set Returned Record From Clear Message Element To New Record

value.stringValue: Screenflow - Lab Order - Submit Lab Order

decisions.description: Confirm/Cancel Do We Need To Bypass Address Validation
decisions.name: Confirm_Cancel_Do_We_Need_To_Bypass_Address_Validation
decisions.label: Confirm/Cancel Do We Need To Bypass Address Validation

decisions.description: Update Opportunity address if there is an opportunity related and suggested address was used
decisions.name: Does_The_Address_Need_To_Be_Updated
decisions.label: Does The Address Need To Be Updated

decisions.name: Does_the_User_want_to_Bypass_the_Address_Validation
decisions.label: Does the User want to Bypass the Address Validation

Flow.description: This flow will be used as a button on the lab order to submit a lab order that hasn't been sent to the lab yet. This will usually be because of an error that prevents this from being submitted.

formulas.name: bool_isNoSuggestion
formulas.expression: OR( {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedStreet} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedCity} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedState} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedPostalCode} = "No Suggestion", {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedCountry} = "No Suggestion" )

Flow.interviewLabel: Screenflow - Lab Order - Submit Lab Order {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Screenflow - Lab Order - Submit Lab Order

recordUpdates.description: We need to set the status and reason to Ordered which will be the initial submission
recordUpdates.name: Update_Lab_Order_Set_Status_and_Reason
recordUpdates.label: Update Lab Order - Set Status and Reason

recordUpdates.name: Update_Lab_Order_with_Error_Message
recordUpdates.label: Update Lab Order with Error Message

fields.name: validation_failed_message
fields.fieldText:
﻿{!$Label.Style_Header_Red}

Address Validation Error


The address provided could not be validated.

fields.name: txt_NextSteps
fields.fieldText:
Next Steps:

Please update the patient's shipping address on the Lab Order record and try submitting again.

Alternatively, you can select to "Continue Anyway" or "Use Suggested Address" if available.

If you need help, contact support.


*NOTE: please know that the address validation might return a false negative (Validated Address and Suggested Address will be the same) due to validation errors. In this case please use "Continue Anyway" button to proceed

fields.name: txt_ConfirmationToBypass
fields.fieldText:
By bypassing address validation, there's a risk that the order may not reach the correct destination.


If you're confident the address is accurate and still wish to proceed, click 'Confirm'. Otherwise, please review the address details before continuing.

fields.name: disclaimer_message
fields.fieldText:
Disclaimer:

The suggested address has been provided based on Google Address Validation. Please verify that all parts of the address are correct before proceeding.

The suggested address may not always reflect accurate or up-to-date information for your intended purpose. By proceeding, you acknowledge and accept any potential discrepancies with the suggested address.



**Suggested Address**

Street: {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedStreet}

City: {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedCity}

State: {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedState}

Postal Code: {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedPostalCode}

Country: {!Validate_Address.suggestedAddress.suggestedCountry}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_txt_Success
fields.fieldText: This Lab Order has not been sent to {!Autolaunch_Lab_Order_Submit_Lab_Order.rec_LabOrder.Lab_Provider__c} due to the above error. Please correct error and re-submit order.

fields.name: txt_ErrorUpdatingLabOrder
fields.fieldText:
Woops, looks like we ran into an error while updating the lab order.


Error:

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: txt_Success
fields.fieldText: Lab Order has successfully been sent to {!Autolaunch_Lab_Order_Submit_Lab_Order.rec_LabOrder.Lab_Provider__c}

subflows.name: Autolaunch_Lab_Order_Submit_Lab_Order
subflows.label: Autolaunch - Lab Order - Submit Lab Order

textTemplates.name: txt_UserButtonPressed_log
textTemplates.text: {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName} Clicked the Submit Lab Order button

value.stringValue: By bypassing address validation, the order may not reach the intended location. If you are certain the address is correct and wish to proceed, please select 'Confirm'.
